education.thesis_title: Deep Learning for Medical Image Segmentation

projects.title: Federated Learning for Privacy-Preserving Medical AI
projects.description: Developed a federated learning framework that enables collaborative training of medical image segmentation models across 5 hospitals without sharing patient data.

projects.title: Real-time Brain-Computer Interface using EEG Signals
projects.description: Built a BCI system that classifies motor imagery EEG signals in real-time using a transformer-based architecture.

publications.title: FedSeg: Federated Learning for Multi-Organ Segmentation in CT Scans

intro_call_summary: Student has strong background in medical imaging and federated learning. Published at MICCAI. Interested in labs working on intersection of privacy-preserving ML and clinical imaging. Open to both CS and biomedical engineering departments. Prefers research-intensive universities with hospital affiliations.
resume_text: Anuradha Sharma | IIT Delhi M.Tech | MICCAI 2024 | PyTorch | Federated Learning | Medical AI
